validation.gui_tests_result: Reviewed current tester/verifier evidence; reviewer re-run was permission-blocked in its subprocess environment.

findings.summary: The direct harness cleanup regression does not yet assert that cleanupOrphanTopLevels() reduces the shown-window count to zero.
The merged tactical and BattleSim live GUI suites now satisfy the planned registration, modal-identity, lifecycle, and baseline-cleanup expectations at the feature level.

follow_up_feature_requests: Tighten GuiHarnessTest::testCleanupOrphanTopLevelsRemovesShownWindows() so it proves cleanupOrphanTopLevels() leaves zero shown top-level windows after cleanup.
